title: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Ulta Beauty stock shimmers on 3Q earnings beat
text: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) shares popped nearly 9% in extended trading Thursday on third-quarter results that beat Street expectations.  The makeup retailer posted earnings of $5.07 per share, above analyst estimates of $4.99 per share, on revenue of $2.5 billion, above estimates of $2.47 billion.
